title: Phase 11: Camoufox Config, SEO/AEO/GEO Commands & Skills
overview: Surface 26 of 27 camoufox-js launch options (all except webgl_config) through browse.json config and named profiles with a --camoufox-profile CLI flag. Add 3 convenience read commands (schema, meta, headings). Update browse skill command docs. Create 5 skills: browse-config (guided config generator), browse-stealth (rewrite), browse-seo, browse-aeo, browse-geo.
scopeChallenge: This is EXPANSION: new config surface (CamoufoxConfig type + loadCamoufoxConfig), new CLI flag (--camoufox-profile), new meta command (profiles), 3 new read commands (schema, meta, headings), 5 new/rewritten skills, new test file + fixture, and user-facing doc updates. Not a simple extension of existing patterns.

prerequisites.verification: src/config.ts — BrowseConfig type, loadConfig() reads browse.json from project root

prerequisites.assumption: Camoufox resolver calls launchOptions() with hardcoded opts
prerequisites.verification: src/engine/resolver.ts:174 — { headless: true, humanize: true, enable_cache: true }

prerequisites.assumption: Command registry supports adding read and meta commands
Runtime flags applied at server spawn only (not hot-reloaded)
prerequisites.verification: src/cli.ts:286 sets env vars before spawning server process

nonGoals: Individual env vars per camoufox option — use browse.json and profiles instead
Selector configs for specific engines — the LLM reads the snapshot
Hot-reloading camoufox config on a running server — profile is set at server spawn

contracts.shape: CamoufoxConfig with 26 optional keys mapping 1:1 to camoufox-js LaunchOptions
contracts.consistencyRule: loadCamoufoxConfig() reads browse.json, then merges BROWSE_CAMOUFOX_PROFILE profile on top (profile wins). Resolver calls loadCamoufoxConfig() directly — no getRuntime() signature change.

contracts.producer: src/cli.ts sets BROWSE_CAMOUFOX_PROFILE env var on server spawn
contracts.consumer: src/config.ts loadCamoufoxConfig() reads the env var
contracts.consistencyRule: Flag only takes effect when spawning a NEW server. If server is already running, the flag is ignored (same behavior as --runtime). Document this in CLI help.

existingCodeLeverage.action: extend (call loadCamoufoxConfig, map keys, pass to launchOptions)

failureModes.risk: Invalid camoufox config crashes browser launch
failureModes.mitigation: Wrap launchOptions() call in try/catch. Log which config key caused the error. Fall back to defaults.
Document in CamoufoxConfig JSDoc. camoufox-js throws on unsupported platforms — try/catch fallback handles it.

failureModes.risk: Malformed profile JSON (syntax error or wrong types)
failureModes.mitigation: loadCamoufoxConfig() wraps JSON.parse in try/catch. On parse failure: log warning with file path, fall back to browse.json defaults only.

failureModes.risk: Invalid merge precedence between browse.json and profile
failureModes.mitigation: Simple Object.assign — profile keys override browse.json keys. Documented in loadCamoufoxConfig() JSDoc. No deep merge — flat override.
Clear error listing available profiles in .browse/profiles/.
Same behavior as --runtime (flag only applies at server spawn). Document in CLI help text and browse-config skill.

failureModes.risk: New commands conflict with existing names
failureModes.mitigation: Verified: no existing commands named schema, meta, headings, or profiles in registry.ts

failureModes.risk: Skill guidance too vague for agent execution
failureModes.mitigation: Every skill step includes exact browse commands. Pattern from browse/SKILL.md.

testCoverageMap.codepath: Camoufox config from browse.json passed to launchOptions()
camelCase → snake_case mapping for all 26 config keys
Named profile loaded and merged (profile wins on conflict)
Malformed profile JSON falls back to defaults
Missing profile throws with available profile list
--camoufox-profile flag parsed and forwarded as env var
schema returns empty on page without structured data
launchOptions() with full mapped config (skipIf camoufox)

tasks.title: CamoufoxConfig type, loadCamoufoxConfig(), and resolver integration
tasks.description:
Extend `src/config.ts` with:

1. `CamoufoxConfig` interface — 26 optional keys mapping 1:1 to camoufox-js LaunchOptions: os, blockImages, blockWebrtc, blockWebgl, disableCoop, geoip, humanize, locale, addons, fonts, customFontsOnly, screen, window, fingerprint, ffVersion, headless, mainWorldEval, firefoxUserPrefs, proxy, enableCache, debug, excludeAddons, executablePath, args, env, virtualDisplay. (26 of 27 — webgl_config excluded per design decision.)

2. `loadCamoufoxConfig(localDir?: string): CamoufoxConfig` function:
   - Read browse.json camoufox section via loadConfig()
   - Check BROWSE_CAMOUFOX_PROFILE env var
   - If set, load .browse/profiles/<name>.json (or <localDir>/profiles/<name>.json)
   - Merge: Object.assign({}, browseJsonConfig, profileConfig) — profile wins
   - On malformed profile JSON: log warning, return browse.json config only
   - On missing profile: throw with list of available profiles
   - On no config at all: return {} (resolver uses its own defaults)

3. Add `camoufox?: CamoufoxConfig` to BrowseConfig interface.

4. `mapCamoufoxConfig(config: CamoufoxConfig): Record<string, unknown>` helper that converts camelCase keys to camoufox-js snake_case.

Update `src/engine/resolver.ts` camoufox loader (line 171-182):
- Import loadCamoufoxConfig and mapCamoufoxConfig
- Call loadCamoufoxConfig() to get merged config
- Call mapCamoufoxConfig() to convert keys
- Merge with defaults (humanize: true, enable_cache: true, headless: from BROWSE_HEADED)
- Pass to camou.launchOptions()
- Wrap in try/catch — on error, log and fall back to original hardcoded defaults

Note: headless: 'virtual' requires Linux with Xvfb — document in JSDoc.
acceptanceCriteria: browse.json { camoufox: { geoip: true, os: 'windows' } } causes launchOptions() to receive { geoip: true, os: 'windows', humanize: true, enable_cache: true }
BROWSE_CAMOUFOX_PROFILE=stealth with .browse/profiles/stealth.json merges profile on top of browse.json
Malformed profile JSON logs warning and falls back to browse.json config without crashing

tasks.title: --camoufox-profile CLI flag and browse profiles meta command
tasks.description:
Add `--camoufox-profile <name>` CLI flag in `src/cli.ts`:
- Add to cliFlags object: `camoufoxProfile: '' as string`
- Parse in main(): `--camoufox-profile` → cliFlags.camoufoxProfile
- In startServer(), set env var on spawn: `env.BROWSE_CAMOUFOX_PROFILE = cliFlags.camoufoxProfile`
- Same pattern as --runtime → BROWSE_RUNTIME
- Update CLI help text to document the flag. Note: only applies when spawning a new server.

Add `browse profiles` meta command:
- Register in `src/automation/registry.ts` as meta command via m() helper
- Implement in `src/commands/meta/profile.ts` (this file already exists for profile/react-devtools/provider commands — extend it):
  - Scan .browse/profiles/*.json (using the localDir from context)
  - For each file: read JSON, extract top-level keys, display as summary
  - If no profiles directory or no files: return '(no camoufox profiles found)'
- Wire into `src/commands/meta/index.ts` dispatch
acceptanceCriteria: browse --camoufox-profile stealth-google sets BROWSE_CAMOUFOX_PROFILE=stealth-google on server spawn
browse profiles lists .browse/profiles/*.json with key summary
browse profiles returns '(no camoufox profiles found)' when directory is empty or missing

tasks.title: Register schema, meta, and headings read commands
tasks.description:
Add 3 new read commands to `src/automation/registry.ts` and implement in `src/commands/read.ts`.

**schema** — extract JSON-LD, Microdata, RDFa via page.evaluate(). Return JSON.
**meta** — extract title, description, canonical, OG, twitter, hreflang, robots, viewport. Return structured text.
**headings** — extract H1-H6 tree with counts. Return indented text.

All three: safeToRetry: true, pageContent: true, MCP schemas via registry mcp field.

Update CLI help text in `src/cli.ts` to list the 3 new commands under Read.
acceptanceCriteria: browse schema on a page with JSON-LD returns parsed structured data
browse meta on a page returns title, description, canonical, OG tags as structured text
browse headings on a page with no headings returns '(no headings found)'

tasks.title: Tests for commands, config, profiles, and CLI flag
tasks.description:
Create `test/seo-commands.test.ts` covering:

**Read command tests** (integration, against real BrowserManager):
- Create `test/fixtures/seo-page.html` with JSON-LD, meta tags, heading hierarchy, Microdata
- schema returns JSON-LD parsed correctly
- schema on page without structured data returns empty message
- meta returns all expected tags
- meta on minimal page returns only title
- headings returns correct count summary and indented tree
- headings on page with no headings returns empty message

**Config tests** (unit, no browser needed):
- loadCamoufoxConfig() with no config returns {}
- loadCamoufoxConfig() reads browse.json camoufox section
- loadCamoufoxConfig() merges profile over browse.json (profile wins)
- loadCamoufoxConfig() with malformed profile JSON falls back to browse.json
- loadCamoufoxConfig() with missing profile throws with available list
- mapCamoufoxConfig() converts all 21 camelCase keys to snake_case correctly

**CLI flag test** (unit):
- --camoufox-profile value is read into cliFlags

**Integration test** (skipIf !camoufoxAvailable):
- launchOptions() called with full mapped config — no error

**profiles command test** (integration):
- browse profiles with no profiles dir returns empty message
- browse profiles with .json files lists them

Register seo-page.html fixture in `test/test-server.ts`.
acceptanceCriteria: All read command tests pass against HTML fixture
Config mapping test verifies camelCase → snake_case for all 26 keys
Profile merge test verifies profile values override browse.json defaults
Integration test (test.skipIf) calls launchOptions() with mapped config — skips when camoufox-js not installed

tasks.title: Update browse skill command docs for new commands and flag
tasks.description:
Update `skill/browse/references/commands.md` to document:
- `browse schema` — under Read commands
- `browse meta` — under Read commands
- `browse headings` — under Read commands
- `browse profiles` — under Meta commands
- `--camoufox-profile <name>` — under Options/Flags
- `BROWSE_CAMOUFOX_PROFILE` — under Environment Variables

Also update `skill/browse/SKILL.md` target decision table to include a row for camoufox profile usage.

Follow existing doc formatting exactly.
acceptanceCriteria: commands.md lists schema, meta, headings with syntax and descriptions
commands.md lists browse profiles under Meta commands
--camoufox-profile documented in Options section with note about server-spawn-only behavior
